headline: Morgan Stanley (MS) Backs Viken Detection To Expand X Ray Inspection Technology
summary: Morgan Stanley Expansion Capital has invested in Viken Detection to support the growth and rollout of advanced X-ray imaging and sensing technologies. The partnership focuses on non-intrusive inspection tools used across security, industrial, and government applications. The deal underlines Morgan Stanley's interest in tech-driven businesses beyond its core banking operations. Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) is drawing fresh attention from investors with this move into X-ray imaging and sensing,...
